assertions.reason: At 375x667, header showed a hamburger menu, desktop nav links were not visible, horizontal scroll could not be performed (scrollX stayed 0), and footer rendered after main content. Console errors: none. Network: HEAD / -> 200.
On mobile viewport, tapping hamburger opened drawer with Home/Blog/About links; tapping close icon closed menu and returned to Open menu state. Console errors: none.
From open mobile menu, tapping Blog navigated to /blog and menu auto-closed (Open menu button visible on destination page). Console errors: none. Network: HEAD /blog -> 200.

frictions.description: Close action on ref @e4 was blocked by an overlapping element during one attempt.
frictions.resolution: Used the alternate visible close control ref @e5, then menu closed successfully.
